# Sangam Skin

> Sangam Skin is an Ayurvedic skincare brand and companion app from Sangam Herbals. It matches people to serums from a range of 118 clinically-formulated Ayurvedic products using a two-minute skin quiz and an AI selfie analysis ("Skin Lens"), and builds a personalised morning/evening routine with an ingredient-safety engine that prevents unsafe combinations (e.g. retinol with acids).

## What it is
- **Skin Lens**: take a selfie and get a cosmetic "skin score" (0–100) across seven signals — Hydration, Texture, Pores, Radiance, Evenness, Calm (redness) and Under-eye — plus serum matches. Cosmetic guidance only, not a medical diagnosis.
- **Skin quiz**: a two-minute questionnaire that produces a personalised AM/PM routine.
- **Catalogue**: 118 Ayurvedic serums across skin, hair, lips and lashes, built on ~50 active ingredients.
- **Ingredient-safety engine**: checks every routine for conflicting actives so incompatible ingredients are never paired.

## Key facts
- Made in India under Dr. Praveen Rathi, following classical Ayurvedic preparation.
- The mobile app (Sangam Skin) is free on iOS and Android.
- Cosmetic and wellbeing use only — not a medicine, and not a substitute for professional medical advice.

## Links
- Website: https://skin.sangamherbals.com
- Skin Lens (AI analysis): https://skin.sangamherbals.com/lens.html
- Skin quiz: https://skin.sangamherbals.com/quiz.html
- Catalogue: https://skin.sangamherbals.com/catalog.html
- Ingredient glossary: https://skin.sangamherbals.com/ingredients.html
- iOS app: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6791218190
- Android app: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.sangamherbals.skin
- Parent brand (herbal products): https://sangamherbals.com
